subtitle: Enter or create an account in a few easy steps.
otpSubtitle: Enter the verification code sent to your phone number
otpErrorMessage: The OTP you entered is incorrect, please try again
paymentPasswordErrorMessage: The payment password you entered is incorrect, please try again
securityNoticeText: To protect your account security, please enter your payment password to complete the verification.
successMessage: Your GoPay account has been successfully linked
successDescription: Your account has been linked. You can now use it for withdrawals and online payments.
failedDescription: We were unable to verify your account information. Please check if your details are correct.
maintenanceMessage: System is under maintenance, please try again later
maintenanceDescription: We are upgrading the system to provide better service. It is expected to resume shortly.
pinSubtitle: Enter your GoPay PIN to log in.
pinDesc: It's quick and secure. No OTP required.
